description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.11.2-alpine3.8 Docker image and defining a single build stage. Set variables ARTIFACTS_DIR=artifacts and REPO_NAME=gitlab.com/diamondburned/gobat-cli. In the compile job (stage build) run the global before_script commands: apk add --no-cache git gcc musl-dev; mkdir -p ${GOPATH}/src/${REPO_NAME}; mkdir -p ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/${ARTIFACTS_DIR}; cp -r ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/* ${GOPATH}/src/${REPO_NAME}/; cd ${GOPATH}/src/${REPO_NAME}. Then execute go get and time go build --ldflags '-linkmode external -extldflags "-static"' -o ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/gobat-cli. Archive the ${ARTIFACTS_DIR} directory as a job artifact.
